The '''''Quickwit''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] courier [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. It had a crew of six, including [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kendra Tissido]]. Before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was attacked by a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] and five [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] when its crew dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to recalibrate its [[Navigation computer/Legends|navcomputer]] settings in the [[Ando system/Legends|Ando system]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|regional/1344_2.html|Shots Fired in Andoan Space}} {{1st}}
